changelog:
• Added several visual improvements to the main application UI. (Important: Go to bin/translation folder and detele all the files from there. Some labels was using icons and we removed them now)
• Expanded Instance Manager — now displays CPU and RAM usage for each process, as well as its runtime.
• Optimized the console logging system and removed duplicate log entries.
• Updated all packages and dependencies to the latest versions (this update may require using SE-Installer).
• Improved overall project performance through various fixes and optimizations for newly added features.
